zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Euphemia Langston於1432年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾列沃斯時，她的父親John Langston II26歲，母親Elizabeth Denton25歲。她於1445年與Richard Danvers在英國諾薩普頓史爾列沃斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1482年2月在英國英格蘭奧可福爾享年50歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾可洛普雷迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Euphemia Langston于1432年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾列沃斯时，她的父亲John Langston II26岁，母亲Elizabeth Denton25岁。她于1445年与Richard Danvers在英国諾薩普頓史爾列沃斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1482年2月在英国英格兰奧可福爾享年50岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾可洛普雷迪。

nameMeanings.name: Langston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from any of various places, for example Langstone in Devon and Hampshire, named with Old English lang ‘long, tall’ + stān ‘stone’, i.e. a menhir.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Euphemia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a Late Greek name derived from eu ‘well, good’ + phēnai ‘to speak’. This was the name of various early saints, notably a virgin martyr said to have been burned at the stake at Chalcedon in 307 . It had a limited popularity in some regions in the 16th and 17th centuries and returned to favour in the Victorian period, especially in the pet form Effie . It is little used at present.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Euphemia Langston was born in 1432, in Culworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Langston II, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth Denton, was 25. She married Richard Danvers in 1445, in Culworth, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in February 1482, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Cropredy, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Euphemia Langston est née en 1432, à Culworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Langston II, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Denton, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Danvers en 1445, à Culworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en février 1482, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Cropredy, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Euphemia Langston 1432 in Culworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Langston II 26 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Denton 25. Sie hat 1445 in Culworth, Northamptonshire, England Richard Danvers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Februar 1482 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Cropredy, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Euphemia Langston è nata il nel 1432 nel Culworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Langston II, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Denton, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Richard Danvers nel 1445, nel Culworth, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel febbraio 1482, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Cropredy, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Euphemia Langstonが1432年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアクウルウオルスで生まれた時，父John Langston IIは26歳，母Elizabeth Dentonは25歳であった。1445年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアクウルウオルスでRichard Danversと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1482年2月にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで50歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアクロプレディにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Euphemia Langston(이)가 1432년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 컬워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Langston II(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Denton(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1445년 영국 노르섬프토실르 컬워스에서 Richard Danvers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1482년 2월 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 크럽레디에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Euphemia Langston nasceu em 1432, em Culworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Langston II, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Denton, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Danvers em 1445, em Culworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em fevereiro de 1482, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Cropredy, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Euphemia Langston родилась в 1432 г. в местности кулворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Langston II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Denton, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Danvers в 1445 г. в местности кулворт, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла февраль 1482 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности кропреди, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Euphemia Langston nació en 1432, en Culworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Langston II, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Denton, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Richard Danvers en 1445, en Culworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en febrero de 1482, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Cropredy, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
